series_metadata.series_title: General Information Files for the Livestock and Agriculture Office
series_metadata.series_description: File Contains: Agriculture, Hortculture and Floriculture; Award Sponsors; Baby Animal Barnyard; Beef Cattle - by breeds; Binding - Entry Department Records Placing for Premium Awards; Cheese; Computer Information (pertaining to Livestock); Copy of Premium Books - charges for printer Junior Livestock, Open Livestock, Agriculture, Horticulture, Floriculture; Correspondence; Dairy Cattle - by breeds; Dairy Goats; Decorating Specifications; Draft Horses - by breeds; Entries - late, received past deadline; Fairs - County, Independent and State; FFA; 4-H; 4-H Dogs; 4-H Horses; Inter-Office Communications; Job Description; Judges - Agriculture, Horticulture & Floriculture, Junior Livestock, Open Livestock; Mailing List for Premium Books; Mailing - Non-Profit Bulk Mailing; Milking Parlor; Needs for Fair; Ohio Expositions Commission - Minutes, Committee Reports, Payroll Disbursements - Livestock and Agriculture staff and judges for fair; Permits - Special late arrivals & early releases; Personnel - Policies and Procedures, Sick and Vacation Forms, Reviews, Entry Department Staff; Photographs & Photographers; Poultry; Protests; Publicity - for livestock & agriculture; Rabbits and Cavies; Refunds - per Entry Department; Requisitions - Printing, Purchase, Printing samples; Ribbons, Rosettes, Trophies & Banners - Orders sent to companies; Sales/Auctions; Schedules; Scholarships and Awards; Sheep - by breeds; Sign Orders; Statistics; Supplies; Suspension Cases; Swine - by breeds; Tractor Pulls.
